results.message:
Database Error in model stg_dim_time (models/staging/stg_dim_time.sql)
  Not found: Table capfractal:raw.brent_monthly was not found in location us-central1
  compiled code at target/run/capstone_monthly/models/staging/stg_dim_time.sql
results.compiled_code:
with observed_months as (

  select distinct
    
    safe_cast(concat(cast(year_month as string), '-01') as date)
   as month_start_date
  from `capfractal`.`raw`.`comtrade_fact`
  where year_month is not null
    and 
    regexp_contains(cast(year_month as string), r'^\d{4}-\d{2}$')
  

  union distinct

  select distinct
    
    safe_cast(concat(cast(year_month as string), '-01') as date)
   as month_start_date
  from `capfractal`.`raw`.`portwatch_monthly`
  where year_month is not null
    and 
    regexp_contains(cast(year_month as string), r'^\d{4}-\d{2}$')
  

  union distinct

  select distinct
    cast(month_start_date as date) as month_start_date
  from `capfractal`.`raw`.`brent_monthly`
  where month_start_date is not null

  union distinct

  select distinct
    
    cast(date_trunc(cast(date as date), month) as date)
   as month_start_date
  from `capfractal`.`raw`.`ecb_fx_eu_daily`
  where date is not null

  union distinct

  select distinct
    
    safe_cast(concat(cast(year_month as string), '-01') as date)
   as month_start_date
  from `capfractal`.`raw`.`bridge_event_month_chokepoint_core`
  where year_month is not null
    and 
    regexp_contains(cast(year_month as string), r'^\d{4}-\d{2}$')
  

  union distinct

  select distinct
    
    safe_cast(concat(cast(year_month as string), '-01') as date)
   as month_start_date
  from `capfractal`.`raw`.`bridge_event_month_maritime_region`
  where year_month is not null
    and 
    regexp_contains(cast(year_month as string), r'^\d{4}-\d{2}$')
  

  union distinct

  select distinct
    
    safe_cast(concat(cast(year as string), '-01-01') as date)
   as month_start_date
  from `capfractal`.`raw`.`energy_vulnerability`
  where year is not null

),

bounds as (

  select
    min(month_start_date) as min_month_start,
    max(month_start_date) as max_month_start
  from observed_months

),

calendar as (

  select
    month_start_date
  from bounds,
  
    unnest(generate_date_array(cast(
    date_sub(cast(min_month_start as date), interval 12 month)
   as date), cast(
    date_add(cast(max_month_start as date), interval 12 month)
   as date), interval 1 month)) as month_start_date
  

)

select
  
    cast(format_date('%Y%m', cast(month_start_date as date)) as INT64)
   as period,
  cast(extract(year from cast(month_start_date as date)) as INT64) as year,
  cast(extract(month from cast(month_start_date as date)) as INT64) as month,
  cast(extract(quarter from cast(month_start_date as date)) as INT64) as quarter,
  
    format_date('%Y-%m', cast(month_start_date as date))
   as year_month,
  month_start_date
from calendar

-- Grain: one row per reporter_iso3 + year + indicator_code.
-- Purpose: standardized long-format country-level energy vulnerability indicators.



with raw_source as (
  select
    cast(dt as date) as dt,
    
    safe_cast(year as INT64)
   as year,
    trim(cast(dataset as string)) as dataset,
    trim(cast(source as string)) as source_name,
    cast(ingest_ts as string) as ingest_ts,
    lower(trim(cast(indicator_alias as string))) as indicator_alias,
    trim(cast(indicator_id as string)) as indicator_id,
    trim(cast(indicator_name as string)) as indicator_name,
    lower(trim(cast(metric_name as string))) as metric_name,
    trim(cast(unit_hint as string)) as unit_hint,
    trim(cast(country_name as string)) as country_name,
    trim(cast(country_id as string)) as country_id,
    upper(trim(cast(country_iso3 as string))) as country_iso3,
    
    safe_cast(value as FLOAT64)
   as indicator_value,
    trim(cast(wb_unit as string)) as wb_unit,
    trim(cast(obs_status as string)) as obs_status,
    
    safe_cast(decimal_places as INT64)
   as decimal_places
  from `capfractal`.`raw`.`energy_vulnerability`
),
standardized as (
  select
    dt,
    coalesce(year, cast(extract(year from cast(dt as date)) as INT64)) as year,
    dataset,
    source_name,
    ingest_ts,
    indicator_alias,
    indicator_id,
    indicator_name,
    coalesce(nullif(metric_name, ''), nullif(indicator_alias, ''), 'unknown_indicator') as indicator_code,
    coalesce(nullif(wb_unit, ''), nullif(unit_hint, '')) as unit,
    country_name as reporter_country_name,
    lower(trim(country_name)) as reporter_country_name_norm,
    country_id,
    country_iso3 as reporter_iso3,
    indicator_value,
    obs_status,
    decimal_places
  from raw_source
),
deduplicated as (
  select
    *,
    row_number() over (
      partition by reporter_iso3, reporter_country_name_norm, year, indicator_code
      order by ingest_ts desc
    ) as _rn
  from standardized
  where year is not null
    and indicator_code is not null
),
final as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    reporter_country_name,
    reporter_country_name_norm,
    country_id,
    year,
    cast((year * 100) + 1 as integer) as period,
    concat(cast(year as string), '-01') as year_month,
    indicator_code,
    indicator_alias,
    indicator_id,
    indicator_name,
    indicator_value,
    unit,
    source_name,
    dataset,
    dt,
    ingest_ts,
    obs_status,
    decimal_places,
    coalesce(reporter_iso3, '') || '|' || cast(year as string) || '|' || indicator_code as grain_key
  from deduplicated
  where _rn = 1
)

select
  reporter_iso3,
  reporter_country_name,
  reporter_country_name_norm,
  country_id,
  year,
  period,
  year_month,
  indicator_code,
  indicator_alias,
  indicator_id,
  indicator_name,
  indicator_value,
  unit,
  source_name,
  dataset,
  dt,
  ingest_ts,
  obs_status,
  decimal_places,
  grain_key
from final
where reporter_iso3 is not null
  and indicator_code is not null

select grain_key
from `capfractal`.`analytics_staging`.`stg_energy_vulnerability`
where grain_key is null

select indicator_code
from `capfractal`.`analytics_staging`.`stg_energy_vulnerability`
where indicator_code is null

select year
from `capfractal`.`analytics_staging`.`stg_energy_vulnerability`
where year is null

select year_month
from `capfractal`.`analytics_staging`.`stg_energy_vulnerability`
where year_month is null

-- Fails when indicator_code is outside the current supported set.

select
  indicator_code
from `capfractal`.`analytics_staging`.`stg_energy_vulnerability`
where indicator_code not in (
  'renewables_share',
  'fossil_fuels_share',
  'dependency_on_imported_energy',
  'oil_electricity_share',
  'gas_electricity_share',
  'coal_electricity_share'
)

-- Fails when reporter_iso3 + year + indicator_code is not unique.

select
  reporter_iso3,
  period,
  indicator_code,
  count(*) as row_count
from `capfractal`.`analytics_staging`.`stg_energy_vulnerability`
group by 1, 2, 3
having count(*) > 1

-- Fails when synthetic annual compatibility period is missing.

select
  reporter_iso3,
  period,
  indicator_code
from `capfractal`.`analytics_staging`.`stg_energy_vulnerability`
where period is null

args.invocation_command: dbt build --profiles-dir . --target bigquery_dev --select stg_dim_time stg_energy_vulnerability mart_reporter_energy_vulnerability mart_reporter_month_macro_features
